items.raw_desc: Szemöldökceruza NYX PROFESSIONAL MAKEUP Blade & Shade, Dual Edge Brow Pencil, Espresso:This reversible pencil from NYX allows you to create brows with subtle streaks and fuller shading. On one end is a sharp, narrow blade that mimics thin hairs, on the other a flat edge to evenly fill in thinner areas. The result is a "nano-blading" effect - tiny, natural lines that look like real eyebrows. Thanks to the gliding pigments, the pencil goes on smoothly, lasts up to 16 hours and doesn't smudge or smear. NYX PROFESSIONAL MAKEUP Blade & Shade Dual Edge Brow Pencil has a vegan formula and has not been tested on animals. Espresso is a dark brown to almost chocolate shade with neutral undertones that does not show a distinct warm or cold undertone.
